title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: Tutorial for building agentic AI applications using Claude Code across desktop, terminal, and VS Code environments. The example project is an AI Resume and Cover Letter Generator with features for personalization, skill suggestions, and theme support. Covers installation, setup with Anthropic API keys, and debugging workflows.
